message:
I am thinking...: 🚨 STUCK LOOP DETECTED — Your last several actions achieved no progress. MANDATORY RECOVERY PROTOCOL:
1. STOP repeating the same approach
2. Analyze what went wrong — what error or non-progress pattern do you see?
3. List 2-3 ALTERNATIVE strategies you haven't tried
4. Pick the most promising one and execute it
5. If the file you're editing has changed, use view to see current content first

DO NOT repeat any action you've already tried. Change your strategy completely.
